plugins.description: Duo skills (design, discuss, forge, prod-ready, research, review, testplan) for symmetric Claude+Codex convergence, plus solo-testplan (Claude-only counterpart producing the same e2e test plan tree), the linked-testplan rulebook, and scripts/check-refs.py validator used by both testplan skills.
